_doc: POST /api/actions dispatch table for the Relatedness Atlas. Round-1 actions (import_relatedness_tsv + normalize_relatedness) handle the generic TSV-capture / staging-to-normalized promotion path. harvest_file (added 2026-05-20) handles the typed-extractor path for the 5 file-backed layers declared in layers.registry.json — resolves layer_key → files.registry.json → path_template.

import_relatedness_tsv.description: Read an ngsRelate / ngsPedigree / mendelian / NAToRA / evalAdmix TSV and emit a staging_relatedness_v0 layer. Bridges toolkit_registries/relatedness/01_registry/analysis_results.tsv pointers into the layer envelope contract.

normalize_relatedness.description: Promote a staging_relatedness_v0 envelope to a typed ngsrelate_pairs_v1 envelope. Reads target.source_layer_id from the workspace layers index, maps columns (a/b/theta/KING/R/nSites/IBS0/1/2), coerces types, validates against ngsrelate_pairs_v1. Worked example of PIPELINE_FLOW.md §'Reversibility — staging today, normalized tomorrow'.

harvest_file.description: Resolve a layer_key (declared with source=file + source_file in layers.registry.json) through the files.registry.json path_template, copy the matched file into raw_results/relatedness/{action_id}/, and dispatch to the matching typed extractor. Companion to the 5 typed extractors added 2026-05-20.
